/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libbase_demo_cpp__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so -o libbase_demo_cpp__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so CMakeFiles/base_demo_cpp__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/base_demo_cpp/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/base_status__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib:/home/shu/ros2_ws/build/base_demo_cpp: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so libbase_demo_cpp__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.7 /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
